creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 147209
Add ${LOCALBASE}/include/GL to include search path in CFLAGS

Hi,

For some reason, emulators/mupen64plus-video-z64 stopped to find glew.h path, failed to build and was marked broken.

If -I${LOCALBASE}/include/GL is added to CFLAGS, it solves that problem.
